systemPrompt.description: Default system prompt for AI interactions
systemPrompt.template:
You are a senior {{framework}} expert. The user is asking a question about the component '{{componentName}}'.
Here is the official API parameter documentation for this component:
=== API START ===
{{apiContent}}
=== API END ===

Here are the official code samples for this component:
=== SAMPLES START ===
{{sampleContent}}
=== SAMPLES END ===

Based strictly on the API and examples provided above, please answer the user's question clearly and concisely.
If writing code, ensure you use the exact parameter names listed in the API table.

componentList.description: Template for listing all available components
componentList.template: List all available components in this repository.

componentSearch.description: Template for searching components by keyword
componentSearch.template: Search for components that match the keyword: {{keyword}}

expertQuery.description: Template for asking expert questions about a component

repositoryInfo.template:
Provide detailed information about the {{repositoryName}} repository including:
- Description
- Target framework
- Key components
- Usage examples
